verdict_reason: The verse's traditional meaning (symmetric-outcome resolution closing the worldly-frame argument; explicit imperative tasmād uttiṣṭha) is preserved alongside the engineering layer. Four commentaries with named traditions. The verse's directional weight (the action is the conclusion) is honored exactly. The engineering layer does not flatten this into 'just ship and learn'; it requires the action to be technically prepared and explicitly carves out asymmetric-failure-mode cases.
